title: rosa pomifera subvar. sericea
intro: Rosa pomifera subvar. sericea, also known as the hairy or sericeous fruit dog-rose, is a variety of the Rosa pomifera plant, native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa pomifera subvar. sericea include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Rosa pomifera subvar. sericea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
